slides.title: TrpB MetaD Cartridge — Week 7
slides.subtitle: From replicator to mechanism-grounded cartridge owner
slides.footer: D1 path reconciled (FP-034) · D2 API draft · D3 lab-facing demo queued

slides.title: 本周定位 — cartridge owner, not replicator
slides.subtitle: Canonical v1.2 framing (PM-ratified 2026-04-22)
bullets: STAR-MD 把 generic protein trajectory generation 做满了
TrpB 需要的是 mechanism-grounded evaluation — 不是再造一个 dynamics model
I build the reusable MetaD cartridge that evaluates / filters / rescues lab's generative pipeline
NOT: I'm building a new ML dynamics layer
NOT: I own the TrpB ground truth
YES: I'm building the mechanism-grounded reference cartridge
YES: STAR-MD and my cartridge are upstream-downstream, not competitors
Replicator framing = asymptotic value 0 once FES converges; owner framing = reusable artifact for Yu/Amin/Raswanth

slides.title: Cartridge = 7 个具体 artifacts，不是抽象 ground truth
slides.subtitle: 7 components · this week closes 3 deliverables (D1 / D2 / D3)

rows: State masks (O, PC, C, off-path, reactive)
Block uncertainty (CI, not a pretty plot)

bullets: D1: Miguel path.pdb reconciled + WT reference defined  (this deck slides 4-10)
D2: replication/cartridge/API_DESIGN.md — signatures + I/O + use-case; no implementation
D3: lab-facing demo — Yu (simple CV fails → PATHMSD diagnoses states) OR Amin (STAR-MD output scored)
slides.footer: Slide 2 / 17  ·  cartridge = reusable artifact  ·  D1 / D2 / D3

slides.title: Lab 生态位图 — upstream / downstream, 不冲突
slides.subtitle: Each teammate owns their layer; cartridge is the mechanism evaluator

leftColumn.heading: Who owns what
bullets: Yu Zhang — MMPBSA ranking + classical MD on design candidates
Amin — STAR-MD fork / SURF benchmark (generic long-horizon protein dynamics)
Raswanth — GRPO reward head on RFD3/MPNN backbones
Arvind — electronic effects on catalytic step (Jan-5 Slack ask, open)
Me — TrpB MetaD cartridge (mechanism-grounded evaluation layer)

rightColumn.heading: Cartridge ↔ STAR-MD relationship
bullets: STAR-MD (arXiv 2602.02128, Feb 2026): generic protein trajectory generator, ATLAS SOTA, microsecond timescale
STAR-MD sits UPSTREAM — general trajectory generation
Cartridge sits DOWNSTREAM — enzyme-specific mechanism scoring on those trajectories
Complementary, NOT competing: STAR-MD has no enzyme-specific task; cartridge provides TrpB as one
Amin Jan-5 ask (substates consistent with MetaD) needs cartridge, not more architecture

slides.title: D1 start — Miguel author email contract (2026-04-23)
slides.subtitle: Osuna-lab first-author reply — parameter set authoritative
slides.code:
# Miguel's METAD line (verbatim extract)
UNITS         LENGTH=A  ENERGY=kcal/mol
ADAPTIVE      DIFF            # NOT GEOM  (FP-031 correction)
HEIGHT        0.15 / 0.3 kcal/mol
BIASFACTOR    10 / 15
WALKERS_N     10
LAMBDA        80 (A^-2)       # self-consistent on *his* path
UPPER_WALLS   ARG=path.zzz  AT=2.5
bullets: ADAPTIVE = DIFF, not GEOM  →  fixes FP-031 (adaptive σ projected wrong axis)
UNITS = A / kcal  — not nm / kJ  (FP-032 SIGMA-unit bookkeeping)
10 walkers with HEIGHT=0.15 kcal/mol, BF=10 (production set)
Miguel's LAMBDA=80 is self-consistent on *his* path — not a universal constant
Must re-derive λ per-path from ⟨MSD⟩ (Branduardi 2007 prescription)
slides.footer: Slide 4 / 17  ·  Miguel contract  ·  FP-031 GEOM→DIFF correction

slides.title: 诊断顺序 — 我们排除的假设 (A, B, C → D)
slides.subtitle: Before touching path geometry, ruled out 3 parameter-level hypotheses

rows: Codex audit of PLUMED multivariate Cholesky
project PC crystals + re-audit residue mapping

bullets.text: Only D remained after A/B/C falsified — motivates FP-034 audit

bullets: Parameter tuning cannot fix a physically-wrong path
Moved from METAD-line tuning to CV-construction audit

slides.title: FP-034 — cross-species residue mapping was wrong
slides.subtitle: 1WDW-B (Pf, 385 aa) vs 3CEP-B (St, 393 aa) differ by +5 N-terminal residues

leftBox.heading: Naive path (what we had)
leftBox.body:
Resid-number alignment: 97 ↔ 97
Identity across 112 Cα: 6.2 %
O↔C RMSD: 10.89 Å
⟨MSD⟩: 0.606 Å²
λ (1/⟨MSD⟩): 3.80 Å⁻²
→ path mixes 2 residue sets

rightBox.heading: Sequence-aligned path (FP-034 fix)
rightBox.body:
NW alignment: uniform +5 offset
112 Cα → true homologs
Identity: 59.0 %  (9.5×)
O↔C RMSD: 2.115 Å  (5.1× tighter)
⟨MSD⟩: 0.0228 Å²
λ: 100.79 Å⁻²

bullets: Line 182 computed a Needleman-Wunsch alignment — line 670 never consumed it
Code ran clean, produced a usable-looking path.pdb — error only surfaced downstream as sampling failure
slides.footer: Slide 6 / 17  ·  FP-034 root cause  ·  silent for 3 weeks

slides.title: Needleman-Wunsch 修复数值 + Codex 独立验证
slides.subtitle: 7/8 strict PASS on independent recomputation

bullets.text: λ=100.79 is self-consistent with our corrected path

bullets: Miguel's 80 on his path → ours 100.79 on ours; 1.26× ratio within tolerance per Branduardi 2007
Codex independent NW: score 286, identity 59.0331 %, offset +5 confirmed — 7/8 PASS (1 rounding)

slides.title: 生物学 sanity — PC 晶体 now mid-path
slides.subtitle: βPC crystals that should sit mid-path actually do now

bullets.text: Three βPC crystals now sit mid-path (s = 5.4–9.5)

bullets: On the naive path they all collapsed to s ≈ 1.07 (indistinguishable from Open)
Codex independent projection: 7/8 PASS (one partial-CV-coverage informational)

slides.title: Pilot 45515869 — same start.gro, corrected path
slides.subtitle: Same Ain cMD starting frame, same walker — only CV changed
bullets: s(R) = 7.09 — not 1.0; 500 ns cMD endpoint sits mid-path
Within 110 ps walker reaches max s = 8.94
Old naive path (45324928): 7.7 ns to reach s = 1.75
≈ 500× qualitative acceleration on path traversal
NOT claimed replication success; only says "the CV now responds"
Production gate: max s(R) > 12 (approach Closed endpoint)
slides.code:
# Corrected path — pilot 45515869 early window
t=0      ps  s= 7.09  z=0.031
t=50     ps  s= 7.92  z=0.048
t=110    ps  s= 8.94  z=0.055
# Old path (45324928): s=1.75 only after 7.7 ns
slides.footer: Slide 9 / 17  ·  pilot 45515869 early signal  ·  gate: max s > 12

slides.title: 10-walker primary production — ready to submit
slides.subtitle: Miguel primary set, seeded from 500 ns Ain cMD

leftColumn.heading: Config (Miguel primary)
bullets: HEIGHT = 0.15 kcal/mol  ·  BIASFACTOR = 10
WALKERS_N = 10  (MULTIPLE_WALKERS)
LAMBDA = 100.79 Å⁻² (our self-consistent value)
UPPER_WALLS on path.zzz AT = 2.5
TEMPERATURE = 350 K  ·  PACE = 500 steps
ADAPTIVE = DIFF (FP-031 corrected)

rightColumn.heading: Seeding + target
bullets: 10 walkers seeded from 500 ns Ain cMD at t = 50, 100, ..., 500 ns
Avoid FP-030 pathology (all walkers starting at same cMD endpoint)
Submit script ready: submit_walkers.sh (miguel_2026-04-23/)
Target: FES reconstruction + JACS 2019 Fig 2a comparison
Timeline TBD pending pilot gate (max s > 12)

bullets.text: Branch C · piecewise PC-anchor (PC at MODEL8)

bullets: Cross-model consultation rejected the single-λ piecewise design (lambda_audit 2026-04-23)

bullets.text: Branch D · sequence-aligned path (FP-034 fix) ← ACCEPTED

bullets: NW alignment → 112 Cα mapped to homologs → λ=100.79 self-consistent on corrected path

slides.title: ML-layer audit — 5 extensions × 2026-04 literature check
slides.subtitle: External novelty audit (2024-2026 arXiv/Nature/JCTC): 1 ALIVE, 2 WEAKENED, 2 DEAD

rows: MEMnets is CV discovery, not runtime gate

bullets: "The cartridge itself is likely more novel than any individual ML layer built on top."
Cartridge = main product; ML layers = optional downstream extensions

slides.title: 保留方向 + 新候选 — 审计后的 5 活 tracks
slides.subtitle: MNG remains lead · merged B+D · new F / G replace C / D independent claim

leftColumn.heading: Kept (downgraded where needed)
bullets: E · MNG (ALIVE, LEAD) — lag-stratified Markov-vs-qMSM runtime trigger for MetaD rescue
B+D merged — FES-consistent trajectory generation submodule (path-CV specific, not generic guidance)
A · CRR — downgraded to projection metric, not RL framework claim

rightColumn.heading: New candidates (replace C, D independence)
bullets: F · PLP-aware reactive PATHMSD — extend path CV with K82-PLP Schiff-base geometry, Dunathan-like angle
G · Generative-model physics-consistency audit — pip-installable wrapper: reweight-JSD / path-distribution / state-occupancy / rare-state recall
This week: NONE of these; only D1 / D2 / D3. ML layers are post-WT-convergence extensions.

slides.footer: Slide 14 / 17  ·  extensions inventory  ·  not this week's work

slides.title: Bytedance STAR-MD 定位 — upstream complement
slides.subtitle: arXiv 2602.02128 (Feb 2026) — Shoghi et al., ByteDance Seed
bullets: "Scalable SE(3)-equivariant diffusion model that generates physically plausible protein trajectories over microsecond timescales"
"Causal diffusion transformer with joint spatio-temporal attention"
"State-of-the-art on ATLAS benchmark · microsecond-scale stable rollouts"
Enzyme-specific — ATLAS benchmark is generic proteins, not catalytic substates
Mechanism-aware — no PLP / Schiff-base / path-CV knowledge
Amin Jan-5 ask ("recover substates consistent with metadynamics") is NOT satisfied by STAR-MD alone
STAR-MD = upstream trajectory generation (generic)
Cartridge = downstream mechanism evaluation (TrpB-specific)
Natural pitch to Amin: TrpB as adversarial enzyme-specific task in his SURF benchmark
slides.footer: Slide 15 / 17  ·  ByteDance STAR-MD  ·  upstream-downstream, not rivals
